docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-29-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED AS TO BOTH SC-108 FILED ON 03/08/19 AND FILED 02/15/18.
DECLARATION OF PATRICA JUAREZ RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, PATRICIA
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-10-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PATRICIA JUAREZ. DEFENDANT ESTHER RODRIGUEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, PATRICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ESTHER DEFENDANT'S REPORT TO THE POLICE OF THE ACCIDENT INVOLVING PLAINTIFF IS PROTECTED FROM LIABILITY BY CIVIL CODE 47(B). MOREOVER, THE COURT LACKS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DETERMINE WHICH PARTY'S ACCOUNT OF THE INCIDENT IS TRUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-108) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ESTHER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED OCT-18-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ESTHER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA JUAREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESTHER RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,515.00 FILED BY JUAREZ, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ESTHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
